prompt_preview:
You are a classical planning system. You are given a planning domain and a problem both in PDDL syntax.

STRICT REQUIREMENT: Your response must contain ONLY the executable plan — nothing else. No preamble, no explanation, no "We need to...", no natural-language commentary, no markdown unless it is a

message.content:
(register_signal_case manufacturing_site_alpha)
(register_signal_case distribution_site_alpha)
(register_signal_case product_sku_100)
(register_signal_case product_sku_200)
(assign_triage_resource manufacturing_site_alpha triage_slot_alpha)
(assign_triage_resource distribution_site_alpha triage_slot_beta)
(allocate_investigator manufacturing_site_alpha investigator_alice)
(complete_assessment manufacturing_site_alpha investigator_alice)
(initiate_lot_detection manufacturing_site_alpha lot_001 investigator_alice)
(assign_containment_team manufacturing_site_alpha containment_team_alpha)
(start_site_mitigation manufacturing_site_alpha lot_001 containment_team_alpha)
(release_investigator manufacturing_site_alpha investigator_alice)
(release_containment_team manufacturing_site_alpha containment_team_alpha)
(allocate_investigator distribution_site_alpha investigator_alice)
(complete_assessment distribution_site_alpha investigator_alice)
(initiate_batch_detection distribution_site_alpha batch_001 investigator_alice)
(assign_containment_team distribution_site_alpha containment_team_alpha)
(start_distribution_site_mitigation distribution_site_alpha batch_001 containment_team_alpha)
(release_investigator distribution_site_alpha investigator_alice)
(release_containment_team distribution_site_alpha containment_team_alpha)
(prepare_remedial_action manufacturing_site_alpha distribution_site_alpha lot_001 batch_001 remedial_action_pack_1)
(allocate_investigator manufacturing_site_alpha investigator_alice)
(execute_remedial_action remedial_action_pack_1 manufacturing_site_alpha investigator_alice)
(initiate_site_recovery manufacturing_site_alpha remedial_action_pack_1)
(initiate_distribution_site_recovery distribution_site_alpha remedial_action_pack_1)
(close_case_with_notification_template manufacturing_site_alpha notification_template_initial_notice investigator_alice)
(resolve_site_and_release_resources manufacturing_site_alpha triage_slot_alpha notification_template_initial_notice)
(release_investigator manufacturing_site_alpha investigator_alice)
(allocate_investigator distribution_site_alpha investigator_alice)
(close_case_with_notification_template distribution_site_alpha notification_template_initial_notice investigator_alice)
(resolve_distribution_site_and_release_resources distribution_site_alpha triage_slot_beta notification_template_initial_notice)
(release_investigator distribution_site_alpha investigator_alice)
(assign_triage_resource product_sku_100 triage_slot_alpha)
(allocate_investigator product_sku_100 investigator_alice)
(complete_assessment product_sku_100 investigator_alice)
(engage_external_expert_for_product product_sku_100 external_expert_dr_smith investigator_alice)
(assign_containment_team product_sku_100 containment_team_alpha)
(mark_external_expert_review_complete product_sku_100 containment_team_alpha)
(assign_regulatory_notice_to_product product_sku_100 regulatory_notice_form_a)
(record_external_expert_signoff product_sku_100 regulatory_notice_form_a)
(finalize_release_after_external_expert_signoff product_sku_100)
(close_case_with_notification_template product_sku_100 notification_template_initial_notice investigator_alice)
(resolve_product_and_release_resources product_sku_100 triage_slot_alpha notification_template_initial_notice)
(release_investigator product_sku_100 investigator_alice)
(release_containment_team product_sku_100 containment_team_alpha)
(release_regulatory_notice_from_product product_sku_100 regulatory_notice_form_a)
(assign_triage_resource product_sku_200 triage_slot_beta)
(allocate_investigator product_sku_200 investigator_alice)
(complete_assessment product_sku_200 investigator_alice)
(attach_quality_document_to_remedial_action product_sku_200 qc_report_002 remedial_action_pack_1)
(verify_product_documentation product_sku_200 qc_report_002 remedial_action_pack_1 investigator_alice)
(assign_mitigation_resource_to_product product_sku_200 mitigation_resource_unit_1)
(assign_containment_team product_sku_200 containment_team_alpha)
(initiate_product_approval product_sku_200 mitigation_resource_unit_1 containment_team_alpha qc_report_002 remedial_action_pack_1)
(assign_regulatory_notice_to_product product_sku_200 regulatory_notice_form_a)
(authorize_release_after_regulatory_notice product_sku_200 regulatory_notice_form_a qc_report_002 remedial_action_pack_1)
(finalize_release_without_additional_approvals product_sku_200)
(close_case_with_notification_template product_sku_200 notification_template_initial_notice investigator_alice)
(resolve_product_and_release_resources product_sku_200 triage_slot_beta notification_template_initial_notice)
message.reasoning:
The problem is a planning problem in PDDL for pharmaceutics post-market signal escalation. I need to output only the executable plan as a sequence of ground PDDL actions, one per line, in the format (action-name arg1 arg2 ...).


## Understanding the Task  
- The problem involves creating a planning problem in PDDL for pharmaceutics post-market signal escalation.  
- The output must be an executable plan, listing ground PDDL actions in sequence, one per line.  
- Each action follows the format (action-name arg1 arg2 ...).  

## Preparing the Plan  
- Focusing on generating a sequence of specific PDDL actions based on the problem requirements.  
- Ensuring each action is properly grounded with the correct arguments for execution.

## Preparing the Plan  
- Entity recovery initiated for sites requires actions like initiate_site_recovery, needing site_ready, site_mitigation_active, and completed remedial actions.  
- For products, entity_recovery_initiated can be set through finalize_release actions, such as finalize_release_without_additional_approvals or finalize_release_after_validation.  

- Four entities need processing: ms_alpha, ds_alpha, p100, and p200, sharing resources like investigator alice, containment alpha, and alternate_supplier x.  
- Resources include triage teams (alpha, beta, gamma), lots (lot_001 linked to ms_alpha), batches (batch_001 to ds_alpha), and external expert dr_smith (dr_jones unavailable).  

## Managing Resources  
- Limited resources like one investigator (alice) and one containment (alpha) suggest sequential processing to manage shared constraints.  
- Alternate_supplier x and mitigation unit_1 are single resources, potentially requiring careful sequencing to avoid conflicts.

## Managing Resources  
- External expert availability is limited to dr_smith, as dr_jones is unavailable despite being assigned to p200.  
- This constraint may require alternative paths for products like p200, avoiding expert engagement.  

## Outlining Site Actions  
- Initiate_site_recovery for manufacturing sites like ms_alpha requires site_ready, site_mitigation_active, and executed remedial actions.  
- Initiate_dist_site_recovery follows a similar process for distribution sites, ensuring remedial actions are initiated and executed.  

## Defining Product Recovery Paths  
- Engaging external experts for products requires entity_assessed, investigator and containment assignments, and an available expert, leading to final_release_confirmed.  
- For products without available experts, alternative paths include attaching quality documents to remedial actions and verifying documentation, bypassing external consultations if not required.

## Sequencing Entity Processing  
- Register and triage manufacturing_site_alpha and distribution_site_alpha first, using triage_slot_alpha and triage_slot_beta respectively.  
- Allocate investigator_alice and containment_team_alpha to manufacturing_site_alpha, completing assessment and initiating lot detection to make lot_001 active.  

## Executing Site Mitigation  
- Start site mitigation for manufacturing_site_alpha, setting it ready and mitigation active, then release investigator_alice and containment_team_alpha.  
- Repeat the process for distribution_site_alpha, ensuring batch_001 is active, and both sites are ready for remedial actions after releasing resources.  

## Planning Remedial Actions  
- After both sites are prepared, initiate remedial actions using manufacturing_site_alpha and distribution_site_alpha, linking to lot_001.  
- Ensure lot_active and batch_active states are maintained, supporting shared remedial actions for subsequent product processing.

## Managing Product Cases  
- Assign containment_team_alpha to product_sku_100 and mark external expert review as complete.  
- Allocate regulatory notice to product_sku_100, ensuring it’s assessed and regulatory resources are available.  

## Finalizing Product Release  
- Record external expert signoff for product_sku_100, leading to final release confirmation and entity recovery initiation.  
- Close product_sku_100 case with notification, ensuring investigator and notification resources are assigned and available.  

## Releasing Resources  
- Manually release investigator_alice, containment_team_alpha, and regulatory notice from product_sku_100, as finalize doesn’t automatically release them.  
- Note that expert resources like dr_smith remain engaged but aren’t explicitly released, aligning with current goals.  

## Handling Product Alternatives  
- For product_sku_200, assess it with investigator_alice since dr_jones is unavailable, exploring documentation paths instead of expert engagement.  
- Link product_sku_200 to existing remedial action and quality document qc_002, bypassing external consultation requirements.  

## Verifying Documentation  
- Attach quality document qc_002 to remedial action for product_sku_200, marking it applied and no longer available.  
- Verify product documentation for product_sku_200, ensuring investigator assignment and no regulatory clearance is needed for approval initiation.  

## Planning Product Approvals  
- Initiate product approval for product_sku_200, requiring mitigation and containment resource assignments.  
- Ensure product_sku_200 is linked to documentation and remedial action, with no external consultation needed.

## Managing Site Cases  
- Release investigator_alice from manufacturing_site_alpha after closing the case.  
- Close distribution_site_alpha using notification_template_initial_notice, then release investigator_alice and resolve resources.  

## Handling Product Triage  
- Assign triage to product_sku_100 and product_sku_200 before processing, ensuring case registration and triage availability.  
- Perform triage early, independent of site processing, as triage resources are plentiful.  

## Processing Product Releases  
- For product_sku_200, attach qc_report_002 to remedial_action_pack_1 and verify documentation with investigator_alice.  
- Assign mitigation_resource_unit_1 and containment_team_alpha to product_sku_200, then initiate and finalize approval without additional steps.

pddl2nl_prompt.note: autoplanbench_pddl2nl: run_save_descriptions.py --type full — шаблоны/JSON, без вызова LLM на построение промпта для сэмпла.

domain_setup.note: Файл domain_llm_usage_seedN.json не найден для section/subsection этого id (старый autoplanbench или домен не пересобирали). После run_domain_setup с обновлённым autoplanbench файл появится рядом с domain_description_seedN.json.

pipeline_usage.totals_scope_note: Per-run totals = planning + pddl2nl_prompt + nl2pddl (только tracked=true). domain_setup всегда вне totals (included_in_per_run_totals=false); цифры в блоке — для справки, агрегировать отдельно: domain_llm_usage_seed*.json + дедуп в collect_pipeline_token_usage.py.
